title: Back-Room Boy
writer: J.O.C. Orton, Val Guest, Marriott Edgar
actors: Arthur Askey, Moore Marriott, Graham Moffatt
plot: A lowly BBC employee pulls a prank at the studio and finds himself transferred to an isolated island where he is to set up a weather station at a lighthouse. As if in a fantasy, a ship carrying a bevy of beautiful models is shipwr...
